questions.text: Which of the following expressions are polynomials in one variable?
questions.explanation: A polynomial in one variable has whole number powers only. y + 2/y has negative power, √x has fractional power.

questions.text: The degree of a zero polynomial is:
questions.explanation: The degree of a zero polynomial (0) is undefined because it has no non-zero terms.

questions.text: A polynomial of degree 2 is called a quadratic polynomial.
questions.explanation: A polynomial of degree 2 is called quadratic, degree 1 is linear, degree 3 is cubic.

questions.text: The coefficient of x^2 in (x + 1)(x - 1) is ________.
questions.explanation: (x + 1)(x - 1) = x^2 - 1. The coefficient of x^2 is 1.
